prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2022–2025年最低位次约670→608→604→607，近三年在604–670区间窄幅波动，2025年基准约607名，整体呈小幅前移后企稳态势；本省理科组计划2022年36人、2023年35人、2024年35人、2025年增至41人；2026年物理类计划25人，较2025年大幅缩招约39%，招生名额显著减少，理论上竞争压力有所缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流；软科主榜2026年第20名，近年排名稳定在前20，属于国内顶尖高校层次；2026年声誉评价偏负面，涉及PPT贬低其他专业、期末考试作弊回应等管理层面争议，但程度较轻；抖音热度总排名第66位，评价为"一般"，短视频平台关注度不高，未出现明显报考热度信号；第五轮学科评估A+学科2个（化学工程与技术、管理科学与工程），A级学科8个，A-级学科10个，共20个A类学科，工科实力雄厚，化工、建筑、精仪、智能与计算等方向均为全国顶尖。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 工科试验班大类招生覆盖电气信息、智能与计算、精仪与光电、智能制造等热门方向，2026年专业热度整体平稳；宁夏2026年考生总数约66000人，较2025年物理类44491人增幅约48%，竞争显著加剧；天津大学位于天津市，非本省高校，无本地倾斜；university_enrol。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2026年大幅缩招（位次前移动力）与宁夏考生总数大幅增加（位次后移压力）两股相反力量，考生增幅远超缩招幅度，叠加声誉偏负面，预计2026年最低位次在2025年基准607名基础上前移，预测最低位次约480名，区间425–535名。

一档（最难进）

- 工科试验班（国家特色化示范性软件学院智能与计算类）。

- 工科试验班（国家试点学院精仪与光电信息类）
- 工科试验班（国家学科培优计划智慧与低碳化工类）。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约480名，区间425–535名。位次在此区间内建议以二档为主力、一档冲刺、三档保底；位次明显优于区间下限（<425名）可重点冲刺一档王牌专业（未来技术学院、智能与计算类）；位次接近区间上限（>535名）建议以三档为主、二档为辅。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: 2022–2025 minimum rankings approximately 670→608→604→607, with narrow fluctuations in the 604–670 range over the past three years, and a 2025 baseline of about 607, showing a slight forward shift then stabilization; the provincial science group plan had 36 in 2022, 35 in 2023, 35 in 2024, and increased to 41 in 2025; the 2026 Physics Category plan is 25, a significant reduction of about 39% compared to 2025, with a notable decrease in enrollment slots, theoretically easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked 20th in the 2026 Soft Science main list, with stable rankings in the top 20 in recent years, belonging to the top tier of domestic universities; the 2026 reputation evaluation is slightly negative, involving management-level controversies such as PPT disparaging other majors and responses to final exam cheating, but of mild severity; Douyin heat total ranking 66th, rated as 'average', with low attention on short video platforms and no obvious application heat signal; fifth round discipline evaluation: 2 A+ disciplines (Chemical Engineering and Technology, Management Science and Engineering), 8 A-level disciplines, 10 A- level disciplines, totaling 20 A-class disciplines, with strong engineering strength, and top national levels in chemical engineering, architecture, precision instruments, intelligent computing, etc.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering experimental class enrollment covers popular directions such as electrical information, intelligent computing, precision instruments and optoelectronics, intelligent manufacturing, etc., with overall stable major popularity in 2026; the total number of examinees in Ningxia in 2026 is about 66,000, an increase of about 48% compared to 44,491 in the Physics Category in 2025, significantly intensifying competition; Tianjin University is located in Tianjin, not a local university in the province, with no local preference; university_enrol.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the two opposing forces of a significant enrollment reduction in 2026 (forward ranking pressure) and a large increase in the total number of examinees in Ningxia (backward ranking pressure), the increase in examinees far exceeds the reduction in enrollment, coupled with a slightly negative reputation, it is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will move forward from the 2025 baseline of 607, with a predicted minimum ranking of about 480, in the range of 425–535.

- Engineering Experimental Class (National Characteristic Demonstration Software College Intelligent Computing Category).

- Engineering Experimental Class (Synthetic Biology and Biological Intelligent Manufacturing Category).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 480, range 425–535. For rankings within this range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 as the main force, Tier 1 as a sprint, and Tier 3 as a safety; for rankings significantly better than the lower limit (<425), focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (Future Technology College, Intelligent Computing Category); for rankings near the upper limit (>535), it is recommended to mainly use Tier 3 with Tier 2 as a supplement.
